title: hedeoma todsenii
intro: Hedeoma todsenii, also known as Todsen's pennyroyal or Mountain pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of essential oils, particularly limonene and camphor, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hedeoma todsenii include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Hedeoma todsenii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and relief from minor ailments.
